body.body:
Follow-up from T-compact-via-tmux-bug (#463) partial fix. The short-term fix added defensive validation but the root cause remains: calling tmux send-keys from WITHIN CC's response path fails because CC's TUI is streaming output and drops input keystrokes.

## The real fix

1. When mcp__igor__request_compaction is called, write the preserve string to a well-known file path (e.g. ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/pending_compact.txt)
2. Add a UserPromptSubmit hook on the CC side (in ~/.claude/settings.json or similar) that runs at the start of the next user turn
3. The hook checks for the pending_compact file; if present, it (a) reads the preserve string, (b) deletes the file, (c) triggers /compact with the preserve text
4. Because UserPromptSubmit fires at the start of a new turn, CC is GUARANTEED to be idle — the keystrokes can't be dropped

## Why this works

The tmux send-keys approach fights CC's state machine. The hook approach cooperates with it: we just stash the intent, and CC picks it up at the next moment it's ready. Same moment human Akien would type /compact himself.

## Scope

1. Update igor_mcp._request_compaction to write the preserve file instead of (or in addition to) sending keys
2. Write the hook script — bash or Python, reads pending_compact, emits /compact command via CC's hook command-execution mechanism
3. Document how to wire the hook into .claude/settings.json
4. Decide: fall back to send-keys as a secondary path if no hook is configured? Or hook-only?
5. Test the file-write path + hook triggering in isolation (hook can be tested by simulating a turn start)
6. Update /savestate skill to document the new mechanism

## Out of scope

- Cross-machine compaction (assumes CC runs on the same host as igor_mcp)
- Multi-session arbitration (if multiple CC windows, which one gets the pending compact?)

## Dependencies

None — the short-term fix is already in place, this is the robust successor.

## Provenance

Diagnosis from T-compact-via-tmux-bug sprint 2026-04-15. Root cause identified during investigation: send-keys during CC streaming gets dropped by the TUI.
body.title: Robust compact: write preserve to file, UserPromptSubmit hook triggers /compact next turn
body.result: File-based handoff: write_compact_pending → cc_compact_pending.txt → hook reads on next turn → injects compact instruction. Fires exactly once. request_compaction tries file first, tmux fallback. 7 tests.
